column1: DFW HVAC - Replacement Estimator Pricing Matrix
Fill the YOUR VALUE column with numbers you're comfortable quoting. Placeholder column is what the live site uses today. Send the sheet back to the agent when done.
SHEET A - HOME SIZE TO TONNAGE
SHEET B - SYSTEM TYPE TO BASE COST PER TON (USD)
SHEET D - EFFICIENCY SEER2 FLAT DOLLAR ADDER (USD)
SHEET E - DUCT CONDITION RANGE ADDER (USD)
Base low (Sheet B matched-low * tonnage * Sheet C standard)
Base high (Sheet B matched-high * tonnage * Sheet C standard)
Low + Sheet D mid + Sheet E older-OK-low
High + Sheet D mid + Sheet E older-OK-high
Final low (low * Sheet F 0.92 rounded to 100)
Final high (high * Sheet F 1.08 rounded to 100)
